cart.title: Your cart
cart.signInToCheckout: Sign in to complete your purchase.
cart.checkoutError: Couldn't start payment. Please try again.
cart.emptyBody: You haven’t added any cards yet. Browse the curated catalog and find that single you’re missing.
cart.authBody: You need a The Pub Market account to complete your purchase. Your cards will still be here when you return.
cart.redirBody: We’re taking you to Stripe to securely complete your payment. Please don’t close this window.

checkout.orderUnavailable: Your payment completed. Order details will appear shortly.
checkout.cancelSubtitle: No charge was made. Your cart is still here.

home.heroTitle: TCG singles, curated by players who know the hobby.
home.heroSub: A discerning selection of singles and sealed product. Known sellers, verified condition, prices in pesos. We start with Magic: The Gathering.
home.pubTitle: Born from a real game store.
home.pubBody: The Pub Market inherits the community of The Pub Game Store in Mexico City: casual restaurant, TCG shop and tables full of players. You buy here with the same trust as at the counter.

curated.title: Curated, not endless
curated.body: Every single is reviewed. No unfiltered bazaar.

condition.title: Verified condition
condition.body: NM to DMG scale applied consistently.

sellers.title: Known sellers
sellers.body: A real community from The Pub Game Store in CDMX.
